task_description: Implement parse_csv_line(line): parse a single CSV record (a string) into a list of field strings. Support double-quoted fields that may contain commas, and the escaped-quote convention where a literal double quote inside a quoted field is encoded as `""`. Empty string returns [''] (one empty field).

bugs_in_buggy.description: No quoted-field handling; commas inside quoted fields are mis-split. `a,"b,c",d` is mis-parsed as 4 fields.
bugs_in_buggy.suggested_fix: Track an in_quotes flag and only treat ',' as a separator when not inside quotes.

bugs_in_tricky.description: Toggling in_quotes on every `"` does not handle the escaped-quote convention `""` inside quoted fields; the literal quote is dropped and quoting state desyncs.
bugs_in_tricky.suggested_fix: When inside a quoted field, peek at the next char: `""` means a literal quote (append `"`, advance 2); a lone `"` closes the field.
